capabilities.name: Native e-signature (capture + evidence)
capabilities.verify: Reframed per docs/parity/references/quotes-contracts-sign-odoo.md (Odoo's own SMB baseline is the free portal sign flow, not an external provider): native signing now covers (1) expiry enforcement at signing time — supabase/functions/quote-sign/index.ts rejects action=accept with HTTP 410 code=quote_expired when valid_until < today, mirroring Odoo is_expired; src/pages/PublicQuotePage.tsx shows the expired banner and disables Accept; (2) draw-signature capture — src/components/public/SignaturePad.tsx (plain canvas, pointer events, undo/clear, no new deps) with Type/Draw tabs on the public sign page, drawn PNG data-URL stored in quote_signatures.signature_image (migration 20260704100000_esign-hardening.sql; server-side sanitized: PNG/JPEG data-URL, <=300k chars); typed-name path unchanged; (3) evidence artifact — quote-sign stores content_hash (SHA-256 of canonical quote content: items/totals/terms/version, via _shared/agent-audit.ts sha256Hex) on the signature row and in audit_logs metadata, and a printable certificate page (src/pages/SignatureCertificatePage.tsx, route /quote/:token/certificate) renders reference+version, signer, signature image or typed name, timestamp, IP, user-agent, hash via token-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC get_quote_certificate (same migration); linked from the public confirmation and from QuoteDetailSheet. manage_quote skill instructions document the 410 expiry failure mode and the certificate URL.
capabilities.notes: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3) — all three legs: (1) DRAW CAPTURE: public quote-sign accept on QUO-0003 with a signature_image PNG data-URL → stored and returned by get_quote_certificate; (2) EVIDENCE: certificate RPC returned signer name/email, signature_image, content_hash a0ff95e3dd4c36af…, ip_address 160.79.106.75, user_agent, signed_at timestamp, plus the payment object (auto-created INV-0024, 21250, paid 0); (3) EXPIRY: accept on an expired quote (QUO-0004, valid_until 2026-07-01) rejected with HTTP 410 code=quote_expired while reject/decline on the same expired quote still succeeded (200) — mirrors Odoo is_expired semantics. Acceptance also auto-created the invoice with the correct discounted totals. No signed-PDF artifact attached to the record (print-to-PDF from the certificate page is the deliberate SMB scope; PDF generation deferred). Provider integrations (Scrive/DocuSign/BankID) remain integration-only per the reference card — never build in-house.

capabilities.name: Sign-and-pay portal confirmation (online payment + prepayment %)
capabilities.verify: Odoo baseline per docs/parity/references/quotes-contracts-sign-odoo.md section 2 (_has_to_be_paid, prepayment_percent: portal confirms a quotation with signature AND payment, optionally a prepayment share). FlowWink R3 build (2026-07-04): (1) Pay-now on the acceptance confirmation — src/pages/PublicQuotePage.tsx shows 'Pay now — {amount}' for accepted quotes with an open invoice balance (payment state via token-gated anon RPC get_quote_payment_status, migration 20260704140000_quote-sign-and-pay.sql, since anon cannot read invoices), and calls the new anon-safe edge function supabase/functions/quote-pay/index.ts (publishable-key fetch pattern, never functions.invoke); quote-pay resolves quote→invoice server-side from accept_token only — client-sent invoice ids are never accepted — and creates a Stripe Checkout session with success/cancel URLs returning to /quote/{token}?payment=success|cancelled (status banners on the page). (2) Payment confirms the flow — supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts checkout.session.completed invoice branch now records via the canonical record_invoice_payment RPC (paid_amount_cents accumulates; status flips to paid only at full balance; June partial-payment semantics reused, no parallel paid-marking; per-session dedupe against audit_logs guards webhook retries) and stamps quotes.paid_at + audit_logs quote.payment_received when metadata.quote_id is present. (3) Prepayment % — quotes.prepayment_pct (nullable numeric, CHECK 1-100, same migration): first payment charges round(total × pct/100) clamped to the open balance, later payments the remainder; admin field in src/components/admin/quotes/QuoteDetailSheet.tsx; manage_quote tool_definition + instructions document the flow and prepayment_pct (src/lib/modules/quotes-module.ts, artifact regenerated via skills:json). (4) Unconfigured instances degrade gracefully: quote-pay returns HTTP 200 {configured:false} when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is absent and the page shows a 'payment not configured' notice (mirrors create-checkout's no-hard-fail stance).
capabilities.notes: Capped at partial: not runtime-verified against a live Supabase/Stripe pair in this session (Stage-3 rule — the webhook leg needs real Stripe events). Deliberate scope cuts vs Odoo: payment does not gate acceptance (FlowWink signs first, then pays — Odoo can require payment before confirmation), no payment-method chooser beyond Stripe Checkout's own, and no sandbox auto-paid simulation for invoices (unlike create-checkout's e-commerce sandbox, simulating invoice payments would falsify AR — unconfigured instances show a notice instead, decided 2026-07-04).

capabilities.name: Expiry reminder automation
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): (1) operator (OpenClaw via gateway) re-sent fixture QUO-0002 through manage_quote send — the redeployed agent-execute (fix 20c00e7b) minted accept_token, confirming the Law-3 fix at runtime; (2) quote-expiry-reminders sweep returned {checked:1, sent:1, skipped:0}; (3) quotes.expiry_reminder_sent_at stamped 2026-07-04T16:52:29Z and outbound_communications row 'Reminder: Quote QUO-0002 from FlowWink' → customer email, status=sent. Fixture cancelled after the run. Mechanism: supabase/functions/quote-expiry-reminders/index.ts scans status='sent' quotes with valid_until in [now-3d, now+48h] and expiry_reminder_sent_at IS NULL, emails via send-quote-email, stamps the quote; send_quote_expiry_reminders skill (edge:quote-expiry-reminders) + 'Quote Expiry Reminders' agent_automations cron (every 6h) via automation-dispatcher
capabilities.notes: Operational finding from the live run: the sweep silently skips every quote when the instance has no site origin configured (resolveSiteOrigin: PUBLIC_SITE_URL env or site_settings.general.siteUrl) — rzhj lacked both; fixed by setting siteUrl. Provisioning implication: siteUrl is required instance config for this feature. Remaining gap (cosmetic, not blocking done): no admin UI to view/trigger the sweep or see reminder history; only the single-quote 'Send Reminder' button (useSendQuoteReminder) has UI.

capabilities.name: Recurring quotes/retainers
capabilities.verify: Recurring quote templates: recurring_quote_templates (source_quote_id, interval weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly, next_run_at, active, generated_count). run_recurring_quotes() SECURITY DEFINER with service_role escape clones source quote lines/tax/currency into a fresh draft and advances next_run_at via advance_quote_recurrence(). Deployed edge function recurring-quotes-cron scheduled every 6h via pg_cron. Admin surface at /admin/quotes → Recurring tab (RecurringQuotesTab.tsx: create/pause/delete/run-now). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-08: run_recurring_quotes generated QUO-R-20260708-f4a34c from a test template and advanced next_run_at.

capabilities.name: Quote attachments
capabilities.verify: Quote attachments: quote_attachments (quote_id, document_id → documents, filename, uploaded_by). Reuses the documents module storage bucket via uploadDocumentForEntity(entityType="quote"). UI: QuoteAttachmentsPanel in QuoteDetailSheet — upload/list/open/remove with signed URLs. LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-08 (table + policies + FK to documents).

capabilities.name: Line-level discounts
capabilities.verify: Two line-item surfaces both support discount_pct now: (1) quotes.line_items (jsonb, the human-editor path) — src/hooks/useInvoices.ts:67 computeInvoiceTotals applies InvoiceLineItem.discount_pct (0-100) before tax per line, wired into the quote editor at src/components/admin/quotes/QuoteDetailSheet.tsx (Disc % input per row), range-guarded by a CHECK constraint (quotes_line_items_discount_pct_range, migration 20260703130000_line-discounts.sql); (2) quote_items table (the agent/skill path) — pre-existing discount_pct column now range-checked (quote_items_discount_pct_range), and agent-execute's 'quotes' case (handler db:quotes behind manage_quote) already threads discount_pct through create/update (insertQuoteItems) plus the add_item action (supabase/functions/agent-execute/index.ts, previously missing — fixed here); manage_quote's tool_definition/instructions in src/lib/modules/quotes-module.ts document discount_pct for add_item
capabilities.notes: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): manage_quote add_item with quantity=2, unit_price_cents=10000, discount_pct=15, tax_rate_pct=25 on QUO-0003 → stored discount_pct=15 and computed exactly line_subtotal_cents=17000 (20000−15%), line_tax_cents=4250, line_total_cents=21250; quote totals matched and the discounted total flowed through to the auto-created invoice on acceptance (INV-0024, 21250). Known architectural split (documented, not blocking): quotes.line_items jsonb (human editor path) vs quote_items table (agent path) are separate storage and not reconciled — a discount set via one path does not show in the other (send-quote-email reads quote_items; the editor reads quotes.line_items).

capabilities.name: Quote amendment workflow
capabilities.verify: Quote amendment workflow: quote_revisions (revision_number unique per quote, snapshot jsonb {prev,next}, prev/new totals, delta, approval_request_id). useAmendQuote hook auto-routes re-approval through the approvals module when delta > 0 and threshold triggers (evaluate("quote",...)); optional reset_acceptance flag reverts sent quote to draft so it can be re-sent. UI: QuoteRevisionsPanel in QuoteDetailSheet. LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-08: revision insert + unique constraint on (quote_id, revision_number).

capabilities.name: Multi-step approval chain routing (EPIC-04 consumption)
capabilities.verify: quotes-module.ts request_approval still calls evaluate_approval_required + inserts approval_requests directly with a single rule_id (no chain_id/current_step); no request_entity_approval call or DB send-gate exists for entity_type='quote'
capabilities.notes: Checked for a rumored EPIC-04 quotes integration: not shipped. Migration 20260611210000 (EPIC-04.6) only wires DB gates for purchase_order and expense_report; docs/parity/epics/EPIC-04-approval-chains.md's Definition of Done lists purchasing+expenses as the only required consumer modules, and no commit touches quotes-module.ts or quotes.json for chains. The existing 'approval_threshold' capability (done) is the older single-rule evaluate_approval_required path, unchanged.
